zh.Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓
zh.Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Engl: 英國斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德
zh.Wykewan, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾維肯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Weston於1256年出生在英國斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德時，他的父親Hugh de Weston32歲，母親Sarah de Stretton25歲。他於大約1270年與Joan Eleanore Hatch在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1333年在他的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓
zh-hans.Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Engl: 英国斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德
zh-hans.Wykewan, Warwickshire, England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾維肯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Weston于1256年出生在英国斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德时，他的父亲Hugh de Weston32岁，母亲Sarah de Stretton25岁。他于大约1270年与Joan Eleanore Hatch在英国英格兰斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1333年在他的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Weston was born in 1256, in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, his father, Hugh de Weston, was 32 and his mother, Sarah de Stretton, was 25. He married Joan Eleanore Hatch about 1270, in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1333, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Weston est né en 1256, à Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Weston, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Stretton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan Eleanore Hatch environ 1270, à Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1333, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Weston 1256 in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Weston 32 und seine Mutter Sarah de Stretton 25. Er hat um 1270 in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Eleanore Hatch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1333 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Weston è nato il nel 1256 nel Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Weston, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Sarah de Stretton, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan Eleanore Hatch circa 1270, nel Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1333, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Westonが1256年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン ウンダー リザルドで生まれた時，父Hugh de Westonは32歳，母Sarah de Strettonは25歳であった。約1270年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン ウンダー リザルドでJoan Eleanore Hatchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1333年に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Weston(이)가 1256년 영국 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Weston(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah de Stretton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드에서 Joan Eleanore Hatch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Wykewan, Warwickshire, England: Wyken, Wæringscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Weston nasceu em 1256, em Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Weston, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Sarah de Stretton, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Eleanore Hatch aproximadamente 1270, em Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1333, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Weston родился в 1256 г. в местности вестон ундир лизард, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Weston было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Stretton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Eleanore Hatch около 1270 г. в местности вестон ундир лизард, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1333 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Weston nació en 1256, en Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Weston, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Sarah de Stretton, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joan Eleanore Hatch aproximadamente 1270, en Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1333, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
